settings.title: A real fermenter on the other end. Not a bot.
settings.subtitle: Median reply 18 minutes during business hours. Send a photo of your jar — we'll diagnose.

settings.heading: When you'll get a reply.
settings.item_1_desc: Full team online. Median reply 12 minutes. Specialist available for fermentation troubleshooting.
settings.item_2_desc: Half-team. Median reply 25 minutes. Specialist available 11am–3pm only.
settings.item_3_desc: Order/shipping queries answered next working day. Fermentation emergencies (mould, off-smell): on-call human within 2 hours.

settings.heading: Three humans you might talk to.
settings.item_1_desc: Lead fermenter. 6 years home-fermenting. Best for: troubleshooting kanji, achaar, kimchi. Will ask for a photo.
settings.item_2_desc: Operations. Best for: order tracking, replacements, COD issues, address changes.
settings.item_3_desc: Recipe lead. Best for: recipe questions, ingredient substitutions, dietary adaptations (vegan, low-salt, gluten-free).

settings.heading: Six categories that cover 95% of messages.
settings.item_1_desc: Stuck batch, surface film, off-smell, no bubbling, taste issues. Send a photo for fastest diagnosis.
settings.item_2_desc: Where's my order, change my address, mark COD as paid, expedite shipping.
settings.item_3_desc: Damaged on arrival, wrong item, batch defect. We send a replacement before you ship the original back.
settings.item_4_desc: Substitutions, scaling up/down, dietary adaptations, what to do with leftover brine.
settings.item_5_desc: Bulk orders, branded packaging, gift cards, scheduled delivery, custom kits for events.
settings.item_6_desc: Pregnancy, kids, medication interactions, allergens, dietary restrictions. We'll point to specific guidance.

settings.title: Message us now.
settings.desc: Tap below — opens WhatsApp on your phone or web. No app install needed.
